violations.description: Each scenario group performs mapping bootstrap in beforeEach, adding repeated setup overhead.
violations.suggestion: Use a scoped shared setup for mapping where isolation guarantees remain intact.

violations.description: Replay cardinality verification adds an additional thread-detail fetch after duplicate delivery.
violations.suggestion: Keep as-is for correctness; only optimize if runtime becomes a bottleneck.

recommendations: Keep split files for better worker scheduling and selective reruns
Reduce repeated mapping bootstrap if environment setup allows
Prefer correctness-preserving verification over micro-optimizing API readbacks
summary: Runtime posture is healthy for API-level ATDD; optimization opportunities are minor and mostly setup-related.
